## What

Briefly, what this changes.

## Why

The problem it solves (link an issue if there is one).

## Checklist

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` is clean
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] New behavior has a fixture + test (including the negative/false-positive case)
- [ ] Ran the CLI on a real App Router project
- [ ] One concern per PR
